answers: Pension = retirement plan where employer pays you regular income after retirement based on salary and years of service.
Types: defined benefit (guaranteed amount), defined contribution (401k/provident fund — depends on investment returns).
Pension vs 401k: pension guarantees income, 401k depends on your investments. Pensions are becoming rarer.
Pension ki: chhakri chhare gele niyomito taka pawar bebostha. Company ba government provide kore.
